title: Create: SpawnerBoxer
description: Deployers from Create mod can now activate spawners!
body:
![A screenshot of ponder introducing the mod content](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d0d87fad5ec59d730f1dcdee52a83c84001d2705.png) # Create: SpawnerBoxer This mod adds ability for Deployer to activate spawners, as if player is standing nearby. ## Requirement - Forge: require Create - Fabric: require Create Fabric and Fabric API ## Notes: The ability to activate spawner depends on the installation status of this mod. Please refer to the following grid: |Installation Status|Client ❎|Client ✅| |---|---|---| |Server ❎| No activation|No activation| |Server ✅| Mobs will spawn from spawner,
but client spawner will render not activated| Both side activates| ## Translation Translation welcome! Please make a pull request to add translations. <3 The following languages are already made: - en_us - zh_cn - zh_tw - zh_hk
